rationale: Educ. Code §49.008 lets consolidated school districts adopt and set homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13 and prevails over inconsistent §11.13 provisions. Raising the base §11.13(b) amount requires conforming rulemaking guidance for consolidated districts.
quote: This section prevails over any inconsistent provision of Section 11.13, Tax Code, or other law.
_note: §49.008 grants consolidated districts independent authority to set exemption amounts; a statutory increase to the §11.13(b) baseline does not directly contradict that authority but may require updated agency guidance.
